title: Stack'da web cache'ni topa olmayapti
story: Ikki servisli stack (web + cache) deploy qilindi: cache ko'tarildi,
web esa o'lib qoldi. Kod o'zgartirilmagan — kecha ishlab turgan edi.
Demak konfiguratsiyada nimadir noto'g'ri. Stack: sims/.lab/compose-mislink/stack
symptom: docker compose -p simfix13 ps   →   cache Up ✓, web Exited(1).  curl localhost:8099 → refused
goal: web servisini tirilt: curl localhost:8099 → 'OK: cache bilan bog'landim'.
setup: cd "$SIM/stack" && docker compose -p simfix13 down -v >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
cd "$SIM/stack" && docker compose -p simfix13 up -d --build >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
cleanup: cd "$SIM/stack" 2>/dev/null && docker compose -p simfix13 down -v --rmi local >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
hints: O'lgan servisning logi:  docker compose -p simfix13 logs web  — u o'lim oldidan nima dedi?
XATO: 'cachee' topilmadi. Compose tarmog'ida servislar NOMI bilan topiladi (Day-18) — servis nomi nima edi?
docker-compose.yml'da REDIS_HOST=cachee → cache ga tuzat, keyin:  docker compose -p simfix13 up -d --build
solution: compose logs web sababni aytdi: app 'cachee' hostini izlayapti (env'da typo), servis esa 'cache' deb nomlangan — compose DNS'i topa olmaydi, app exit 1. Fix: REDIS_HOST=cache, up -d. Diagnostika zanjiri: ps (kim o'lgan) → logs (nega) → config (qayerda xato) — multi-servis stack'larning standart tekshiruvi (Day-18/21).
